html:query.declare: <ROW oi_empresa="2" oi_grupo_jur="" oi_jurisdiccion="" cerrado = "" d_carpeta="" oi_sujeto="" oi_estado_carpeta="" oi_rol_parte="" oi_sujeto_parte="" f_carpeta="" oi_ubicacion="" listNros="" nro_desde1="" nro_desde2="" nro_desde3="" nro_hasta1="" nro_hasta2="" nro_hasta3="" salida="HTML" listCods="" f_carpeta_d="" f_carpeta_h="" cod_desde1="" cod_hasta1="" TIPOSCARPETAS_IDs="IN ( \'3\',\'2\' )"/>

qry:select.name: sqlEmpresa
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP WHERE EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlSujeto
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUJ.c_sujeto, SUJ.d_sujeto FROM LEG40_SUJETOS as SUJ WHERE SUJ.oi_sujeto = {#SOURCE:@oi_sujeto} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlEstado
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EST.c_estado, EST.d_estado FROM LEG31_ESTADOS as EST WHERE EST.oi_estado = {#SOURCE:@oi_estado_carpeta} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlRolParte
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ROL.c_rol, ROL.d_rol FROM LEG33_ROL as ROL WHERE ROL.oi_rol = {#SOURCE:@oi_rol_parte} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlSujetoParte
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUJ.c_sujeto, SUJ.d_sujeto FROM LEG40_SUJETOS as SUJ WHERE SUJ.oi_sujeto = {#SOURCE:@oi_sujeto_parte} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlSucursal
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT U.c_ubicacion, U.d_ubicacion FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES as U WHERE U.oi_ubicacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_ubicacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlGrupoJuris
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT G.c_grupo_jur, G.d_grupo_jur FROM LEG48_GRUPO_JUR as G WHERE G.oi_grupo_jur = {#SOURCE:@oi_grupo_jur} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlJuris
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT J.c_jurisdiccion, J.d_jurisdiccion FROM LEG48_JURISDICCION as J WHERE J.oi_jurisdiccion = {#SOURCE:@oi_jurisdiccion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_Seguridad
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT C.oi_carpeta, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_USER\' as POLICY
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as C
WHERE C.oi_ubicacion IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
UNION
SELECT C.oi_carpeta, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_ADMIN\' as POLICY
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as C
WHERE C.oi_ubicacion NOT IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlCarpetas
sqlTipoCarp
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA.d_tipo_carpeta FROM LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA WHERE LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA.oi_tipo_carpeta {%=#SOURCE:@TIPOSCARPETAS_IDs%} ')/ROWS/ROW
